/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libinterfaz_temp__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/interfaz_temp/libinterfaz_temp__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/interfaz_temp__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/interfaz_temp/srv/_temp_conversion_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/ros2_ws/build/interfaz_temp:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libinterfaz_temp__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libinterfaz_temp__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
